text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days after winning the Yasuda Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text: It's time for Horsegirl Secrets. Today, I'm visiting Tracen Academy, where I'm meeting with a very special guest.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
She's mastered the mile by winning the NHK Mile
Cup, the Mile Championship, and the Yasuda
Kinen...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hola! I'm the world's strongest racer, El Condor
Pasa!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
I'm here today to get the behind-the-scenes
scoop on your journey!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hehe! You can ask me aaanything!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
My dream is to become the strongest racer in the
whole world! All you've seen from El Condor in
the Twinkle Series has been for that purpose!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
A few things came up during my classic year... but
my dream remains unchanged!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
And so, my current goal is to win the Japan Cup
in my senior year!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But before that... I need to make sure even more
people witness my power!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
After all, even in wrestling, more strength means
more excitement!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That's the reason I ran in so many mile races! To
master the mile!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text: Oh, I see!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: ...Yup!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, we came up with that reasoning
after the fact... but there's no denying her
achievements.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text: I see! This is getting more exciting by the second!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, we move around the school and talk
about topics ranging from her debut to the other
runners in her generation. Then...

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text: And finally, we've arrived at the trainer's office.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
This space holds every trophy the pair have
earned, the road map they took to get here, and
the moments that led to miracles.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hehehe! You could call it our secret base!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
I imagine there must have been a roadblock or
two you hit along the way, given how grand your
dream is.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm hella strong, so of course it was smooth sailing
the entire way!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite times of hesitation and occasionally
having to change course, El Condor Pasa has
always kept to her ideals while taking on the
Twinkle Series and made her mark.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell the interviewer about our experiences while
choosing my words carefully.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
I see... Even someone as optimistic and cheerful
as El Condor Pasa can struggle sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
But she never lets those struggles show and works
hard to entertain her audience. That's why we
love her!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Heh... Hehehe! You know it!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That's me, El Condor Pasa! I know how to get the
crowd going!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Yup, everything my trainer said is true! But, well...
um...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hearing Trainer compliment me like that is a bit embarrassing...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The conversation continues for a while, and
then...

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
So, to wrap things up, could you two leave us
with a few final words?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Yes! Okay, let's do this, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Who's the Umamusume you're so proud of?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Who's the master of the mile?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Who's the Umamusume who'll take on the world?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Bueno!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
My Twinkle Series isn't over yet! Thank you for
your support!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The program ends with a bright smile from El
Condor Pasa.
